markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Intro GrowthX's AI-driven content services to BCV for portfolio referrals.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**GrowthX's Model:** A "platform + talent" model combining AI agents with a 55-person delivery team (editors, SEO specialists) to scale high-quality content.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**De-Risking Engagement:** A paid 8-week, \~$30k strategy sprint defines the content strategy and calibrates quality, de-risking the relationship for both GrowthX and the client.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
  - [**Continuous Asset Management:** Content is treated as a decaying asset requiring daily updates (500–1k pages/week) to maintain relevance and "AI visibility" in search results.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=1670.0)
  - [**BCV's Interest:** BCV will refer portfolio companies to GrowthX and plans to host a portfolio-wide presentation on GEO/AIEO.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=1848.0)

## Topics

### BCV's Content Challenges

  - [**Firm-level:** Difficulty getting partners to create content and achieving readership in a competitive VC landscape.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [**Portfolio-level:** High demand for expert resources on GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) and AIEO (AI-Enhanced Engine Optimization).](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [**Strategic:** Deciding how to allocate finite resources (time, budget) between written content and video for maximum impact.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)

### GrowthX's Solution: Platform + Talent

  - [**Founder's Background:** Marcel Santilli's career is built on scaling content as a media company, not just marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
      - [**HP:** Grew a contributor network to 1M+ visitors/mo with $0 ad spend, generating \>50% of software leads.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
      - [**Service Titan:** Built "Toolbox" (podcast, tools) to serve contractors, now a majority of their pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
      - [**DeepGram:** Used AI workflows to 24x traffic in 3 months.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [**Company Growth:**](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
      - [**Revenue:** Nearing $50M ARR (cash-flow positive for 2 months).](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
      - [**Team:** \~90 people, including 55 in delivery (editors, SEO, engineers).](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [**Core Philosophy:** Content is the "atomic unit" of all marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)

### The GrowthX Process: Strategy First

  - [**8-Week Strategy Sprint (\~$30k):**](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
      - [**Purpose:** De-risk engagement by defining strategy, calibrating quality, and setting up the workspace.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
      - [**Outcome:** A complete content strategy and artifacts, valuable even if the client doesn't continue.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
      - [**Continuation Rate:** \~80–85% of clients proceed to recurring workstreams.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
  - [**"Context Engineering":**](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
      - [**Process:** Deep research and weekly team syncs to understand the client's business, audience, and goals.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This deep context is the foundation for effective AI agents; it's about providing the right "big picture," not just prompt engineering.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
  - [**Case Study: Lovable**](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
      - [**Problem:** Needed to scale content for broad reach, not just incremental clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
      - [**Solution:** Built a high-volume, high-intent "guides" section.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
      - [**Impact:** A technical audit during the sprint found and fixed thousands of malicious subdomain pages that risked a Google domain ban.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)

### Execution: AI Agents & Continuous Refresh

  - [**Agentic Workflow Framework:**](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [**Research:** A robust researcher agent runs for \>30 minutes per piece, using high-compute ($5/piece) to filter out low-quality sources.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
      - [**Drafting:** A custom drafter agent uses "evals in the loop" to refine content based on guidelines and roundness.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)
      - [**Editing:** A human editor is always in the loop, with the client's team involvement level being flexible.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
  - [**Continuous Asset Management:**](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=1670.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Content is a decaying asset requiring constant updates to maintain "AI visibility" in search results.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=1670.0)
      - [**Cadence:** Daily publishing and refreshing (500–1k pages/week) across all clients.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)
      - [**Examples:**](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=1580.0)
          - [**Ramp:** Built a vendor catalog and editorial content.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=1580.0)
          - [**Augment Code:** Achieved \>20x AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
          - [**Grammarly:** Performed surgical updates across all relevant pages after the Superhuman merger.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=1795.0)

### Client Profile & Pricing

  - [**Ideal Client Profile (ICP):**](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)
      - [**Established:** Must have an existing website and some domain authority to ensure faster signal generation.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
      - [**Strategic:** Views content as a long-term asset build, not a transactional ad spend.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
      - [**Clear:** Has a defined audience and internal decision-maker for quality and goals.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)
  - [**Pricing Model:**](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
      - [**Phase 1:** 8-week Strategy Sprint (\~$30k).](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
      - [**Phase 2:** Recurring monthly retainers based on workstreams (e.g., editorial, templates).](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=1580.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**BCV:** Refer portfolio companies to GrowthX (CC Tyler Pavlas).](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=1848.0)
  - [**BCV:** Host a portfolio-wide presentation with GrowthX on GEO and AIEO.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=1854.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Share a discounted coupon code for the `AILikeGrowth.com` community for BCV to include in its CMO newsletter.](https://fathom.video/share/-9-KxxBP-xMStq4sy5Ry1tyYWLquhuWu?tab=summary&timestamp=1867.0)
